title: Suitable For Siemens, IQ500 IQ300 Drum Washing Machine Bosch Drain Pump Motor
features: Efficient Drainage: High-torque motor plus detachable filter empty the tub fast and make routine cleaning effortless.
Built to Last: Rust-resistant metal reinforced with tough ABS, factory-tested for extra-long service life.
Whisper-Quiet: Precision-balanced impeller and premium oil keep noise to a minimum during every cycle.
Tool-Free Install: Align, tighten, done—replace in under 10 minutes with just a Phillips screwdriver.
Universal Fit: Engineered to match most front-load washers—swap out the old pump with no modifications.
